reviews.text: Good service 👍
Excellent service like diagnostic related,home services etc.
Excellent
V good
Very good service and gentlemen visited very polite and professional
Very good service.Specially Home visit by Shailender. Very friendly & cooperative staff.

Really good experience at Tridot Care. The staff was polite and helpful, and everything was handled professionally. The technician was experienced, sample collection was smooth without any hassle, and I got my reports on time. Overall, very satisfied with the service. Recommended. Thank you!

Good experience at tridot care . Staff is supportive and professional. Good experience technician, smooth sample collection, and got my reports on time. Recommended.
Thank you.

Thanks for the great experience. No waiting, prompt service and all of the above all staff is supportive and soft spoken.
Thanks.

Thanks. No waiting time, done very quickly. Office is clean. Staff is also good. Everything goes very smoothly. One request to staff, disposal glasses for drinking water should me kept in proper manner.

I was extremely excited to receive my ring and it has not disappointed yet! As someone who deals with chronic illness, multiple hospital/doctor visits, it’s been extremely beneficial to share the information from my ring and also helps monitor myself at home! Huge fan that it also connect with the Apple Watch/Apple health. I would definitely recommend this to anyone, but especially those with health concerns/issues!

I am very blessed to have my mother being monitored by oneai! I have peace of mind since her stroke to know she is being looked after 24/7 by simply just wearing her oneai ring. I highly recommend this innovative device to bring  a sense of ease to any one else that has elderly parents .
Nicole

This ring is very comfortable to wear and gives me live updates and great insights on my health throughout the day and night. The app is simple and syncs with Apple Health, which I love. It’s been really helpful for tracking my health without wearing a big device.

I purchased my ring several months ago and I love it. It is so easy to see all of your health data on the app. I like keeping track of my steps each day and the ring makes that possible. Last but not least it looks nice on your hand.
I recommend giving it a try.

I've had an amazing experience with ONEai Health. Their monitoring service is truly next-level—it's accurate, easy to use, and gives me real peace of mind. I love knowing that my health data is being tracked in real time and that I have a team behind me keeping an eye on it. The platform is super intuitive, and the support from their staff has always been friendly and responsive. I can’t recommend ONEai Health enough—this service has made a real difference in how I manage my health day-to-day.

This is very nice lab and thanks to reetu .
Reetu is very great staff in center.
She is Brilliant.
And very nice behavior .
Very nicely talking patient. ❤❤❤❤❤❤❤❤
Just amazing
Excellent services and support, must visit

I really had good experience over here..
Staff is very good..neat and clean lab

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Excellent Service and Cooperative Staff!

I had a very good experience at Prakash Path and USG Center. The diagnostic services are accurate, timely, and handled with great care. The staff is polite and professional, and the facilities are clean and well-maintained.

A special mention to Mr. Mehraj, who is extremely helpful, cooperative, and patient-friendly. He guided us through the whole process smoothly and ensured everything was done without any hassle.

Highly recommend Prakash Path and USG Center for reliable reports and excellent customer service!

Staff is very kind and polite. On asking they have provide me valid discount and did not bother for anything, in my case I was looking for OPG X-ray, guess what, they have done it all within 15 minutes (report time included). Their services are excellent and effective.

Not Recommended

1. The diagnostic center should have informed us in advance that a male doctor would be performing the ultrasound. We were not notified and were surprised at the time of the scan.
2. The reception team assured us that a 3D scan would be provided if the baby's face was visible. However, the doctor declined the 3D scan outright, citing that we were already at 36 weeks. We chose this center primarily for the 3D scan and feel misled by the incorrect information provided.
3. Hygiene - they gave cloth instead of tissue to wipe the fluid used in ultrasound. Very unhygienic

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐"I had a great experience at [accurad diagnostic centre]. The staff is professional, well-behaved, and efficient. I was in and out for my scan very quickly. The facility was clean and sanitized, which made me feel safe. Highly recommended for accurate and prompt services!"thank you...

Went with expecting lot of waiting time but it’s happened with short period of time, well behaved people around and they will response immediately towards the patient. Over all excellent experience with Doctors and nurses. Special thanks to 1st floor reception who communicated very professional and polite. Highly recommended place for health checkup.

No value for patient’s time.
Facilities are good but staff doesn’t value one’s time. We waited for more than an hour after doctor/respective person arrival only because he entered a board room meeting after coming instead of attending patients who were already waiting for him. Please value someone time.

They don’t have basic sense. Initially, they said the doctor would come in 5 minutes, but he arrived after 1 hour.
If you don’t have any time constraints and no other work, only then should you visit here.
If you need quick service, there are several diagnostic centers around that you can visit.

I have bill — it’s genuine review
Ayan Khan was assisting me. Very professional and greatly skilled person. All the test were very easily done by him
Ayan Khan visited at home. He was polite and  courteous. He showed his ID and explained the about the process. Everything was done smoothly within 25min.

I had a wonderful experience! The home sample collection service was prompt, and the technician was courteous, well-dressed, and extremely professional. The blood draw was completely painless, and I received my reliable reports exactly when promised. Excellent service.

NT PRO LAB provides smooth and timely testing services with excellent accuracy.
The staff is professional, friendly, and always ready to help patients.
Reports are delivered quickly, making the whole process stress-free and reliable.
Highly recommended for quality diagnostics and outstanding customer care.

Client name: sohan
Date: 08/05/2026
Good experience at nt pro lab  .Staff is supportive and professional. Good experience technician, smooth sample collection, and got my reports on time. Recommended.
Thank you.

Excellent service! The staff at Easy Path Lab is very friendly and supportive. The clinic is clean, hygienic, and well-organized. I am very satisfied with my experience and would highly recommend it.

“Excellent laboratory service. The staff was polite, professional, and very helpful. The sample collection process was smooth and hygienic, and the reports were delivered on time. The technicians explained everything clearly and made me feel comfortable. I highly recommend this lab for accurate testing and quality service.”

“Had a smooth experience at the lab. Staff was polite, sample collection was hygienic, and reports were delivered on time. The technicians were professional and explained the process clearly. Overall, reliable service and good management.”
Good atmosphere, staff's are cooperative nd friendly.we had a great experience here specially my child was enjoying there as we had there for a long time so we're cautious about him.
Received best hospitalise, cooperative and supportive service by floor team. Very good hygiene and housekeeping. Well behavior and activities done by team. Much appreciated Arif and Sonali
It was good experience with Salman. He took blood without any pain. I have good experience here

Highly unprofessional cheat customers I shared doctor prescription with all test details to be done and asked for price asking ensure all test are covered but these people are fraudsters multiple times I had to check myself for test coverage and they were trying to collect money without covering test and now when I visited doctor came to know that test not covered and when I message see attached response highly unethical and unreliable diagnostic centre will not recommend anyone going forward
Arun yadav behaviour is good, he came on time and polite also
I had a great experience with Red Diagnostics. I had booked by health checkup via HDFC Life. I was attended by Sarfaraz Ali, really a trained personnel. Highly appreciate the services.

I had a great experience at Red diagnostics. Everything is so systematic and radiologists are so experienced and helpful.
I have gone through my corporate plan of Gold Health complete check up. I really loved their services, hygiene and on time delivery of reports.
Good service

Excellent services from the lab in the Mayur Vihar phase 1 area, specially the waiting time is very very low..

Mr Aman Sharam, Centre Head did my TMT very expertly and dedicatedly. The service on the lab is timely and effective.
Nice performance and she is very polite in whole process by Kanchan sharma.
Such a wonderful behaviour I like it's very much ❤️❤️❤️
Very good service and timely done all the test and collect sample from home
Tara Shankar Ji came to take the Sample collection.....job done effortlessly...good behaviour...thanks

We had lots of difficulties to find the location. There is no board no poster or banner about the lab. We reach at 8:35 am however the lab open at 9am and in Google map at their location show the lab open at 8am which is false. We asked 2-3 people about the lab but no one knows about this. Finally we called at their given number and they guide wrong direction. We ask one more guy which he guide us to find exact place. Also till time lab tech came. He was nice and talk gently and we don't have any issue with his work however we are not satisfied with lab Report specially my wife sgpt and ldl triglycerides and vldl is high. Also if we go to other pathlab they provide us serial number so we can download the report at same day but they have procedure if you are going to their location frm your health insurance you have to download report from their we or app. Hope they will consider this feedback specially some direction or location they will mark so people don't have to roam here and there for finding lab.
It was a good experience All Staff  and especially Sameer was polite overall NICE

It was really amazing experience with them, Mr. Ajit goswami and his team has good experience to deal with customer. Impressed with thier support and experience.

Thier lab service really appreciated and highly recommended.
Very good service and specially mr.pradeep os very kind and knowledgeable person.
A very professional and polite Physico Coming for blood test (Name :- Ajit Goswami)
Mr Abhay and Ms Mamta were on time and followed the whole procedure and made the process very easy and smooth.

I had a great experience at FIFTY ONE PLUS LAB, Noida (One Plus Lab). The lab facilities are excellent, and all the staff are very cooperative and professional. The staff is courteous, and the entire process went smoothly. The lab environment is clean and organized. Overall, this is a great lab, and I highly recommend its services.

Three days of no showing up; they provide home collection appointments daily, and requests for 12 hours fasting.

Day 1: Sir, I am late, so I prefer not to come; it's hot
Day 2: My bike isn't working. I said, I am happy to wait, but he insisted on rescheduling for the next day
Day 3: Sir, I am sick, so I won't be coming. No response to messages or calls.

Extremely horrible service. Pathetic on-call staff with no respect for time and life.

I wish the government would cancel their license.
Completely unprofessional, nobody comes on time when I reached only a dog is there. My reporting time was 8 AM  and when I called they mention that staff comes by 8:30 to 9. Also an unhygienic place.

The lab provides quick and efficient testing services. The staff is well-organized, and the overall experience is smooth. The space is well-maintained and comfortable. Overall, a very good diagnostic center

I was quite impressed when I visited but after two months, my opinion is totally changed.
Quality /test results are bad even though they are quite fast.

I had Niva Bupa insurance and this lab has a tie up for annual check up with them.

I saw the reviews and booked my wife's annual health check up. I was quite impressed with the clockwork speed they work. Everything was working as well oiled machine and within 1 hour everything was done (including ultrasound, pap smear etc.). Both of us were quite impressed with the efficiency of the lab at that time (second week of October 2025).

Fast forward to Last week of November (6 weeks post annual check up), my wife had quite sever pain in abdomen. We went for ultrasound to a different lab and doctor said she is having stone in kidney(5mm) and gall bladder (3mm).

So, yes they are fast & efficient but quality is not reliable and for health, quality of tests is of highest importance and NOT HOW FAST You can provide the service.

I will not recommend this lab to anyone.
When I went to the lab, I was impressed by the staff behaviour and the fact that they conduct the management tests very well and also give 100% correct reports.
